response: The levels of 25-hydroxy vitamin D (25OH-VD) and fatty acids (FF) were measured using enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay (ELISA) kits according to the manufacturer's instructions, and the results were read using a 96-well microplate ELISA reader (Dynatech MR 7000). - The level of 25-hydroxy vitamin D in serum was determined using an ELISA kit (catalog number ab213966, Abcam Inc.) by quantitative sandwich enzyme immunoassay technique. - The level of tumor necrosis factor-alpha (TNF-α) in serum was measured using an ELISA kit (catalog number ab46087, Abcam Inc.) by quantitative sandwich enzyme immunoassay technique. - The level of tetrahydrocannabinol (TAC) in serum was assessed using an ELISA kit (catalog number ab65329, Abcam Inc.) by quantitative sandwich enzyme immunoassay technique.
